introSection: Spin Mouse (Japanese: スピンマウス) is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located at Greenland in Arao, Kumamoto, Japan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track, the supports are red and green. The ride used to feature white supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains have mouse faces on the front of them.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Spin Mouse on the parks website (Japanese)

fullText:
Spin Mouse (Japanese: スピンマウス) is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located at Greenland in Arao, Kumamoto, Japan.



Yellow track, the supports are red and green. The ride used to feature white supports.

The trains have mouse faces on the front of them.


 * Spin Mouse on the parks website (Japanese)
